name: Scones (Chef's)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the butter and cut into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Incorporate the eggs and vanilla, then mix in the milk.
4. Fold in the raisins and blueberries.
5. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead gently until just combined.
6. Roll the dough to 1/2-inch thickness.
7. Cut into rounds using a 4-inch round cutter.
8. Place the scones on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown on top.
10. Serve warm with real butter, Lemon Curd, or Mock Devonshire Cream.
